title: FinnGen
description: The FinnGen integration provides access to genomic and phenotypic data from the FinnGen study within the Parthenon platform. Researchers can leverage linked genomic information alongside OMOP clinical data to support translational research and genotype-phenotype investigations.
tips: Ensure your cohort definitions are aligned with FinnGen phenotype endpoints before initiating genomic analyses.
Review data access and governance requirements specific to FinnGen before exporting or publishing results derived from this dataset.
Combine FinnGen genomic data with OMOP clinical data to enrich patient-level analyses with genetic context.
Consult the Genomics Overview documentation to understand the available data types and analytical capabilities within the FinnGen integration.
